entities.name: strategy-compounder
entities.context: Analysis tool for strategic health checks, runs scheduled analyses and generates reports with heat zones, cohesion scores, and at-risk theme flags

entities.name: Sliding Window
entities.context: Analysis technique with configurable window size (default: last 10 sessions OR 30 days)

entities.name: Decay Factor (λ)
entities.context: Mathematical parameter used in the strategy-compounder analysis

entities.name: Heat Zones
entities.context: Output visualization showing areas of strategic focus or concern

entities.name: Cohesion Score
entities.context: Metric measuring strategic coherence across themes

entities.name: At-Risk Themes
entities.context: Flagged themes requiring attention, part of early warning system

entities.name: Weekly Analysis
entities.context: Scheduled every Sunday 6 PM ET, analyzes past week, feeds into Monday planning

entities.name: Monthly Analysis
entities.context: Scheduled last day of month 6 PM ET, comprehensive analysis with full evolution report and all visualizations

entities.name: Quarterly Reviews
entities.context: On-demand analysis with full-report flag for periodic strategic assessment

entities.name: Monday Planning
entities.context: Weekly planning session that receives input from Sunday's strategic analysis

relationships.context: Configurable analysis window for session/time-based scoping
Parameter for weighting recent vs older data
Flags at-risk themes as part of early warning system
Weekly analysis feeds into Monday planning input
